n_train_samples: CoOp gap to LoRA widens monotonically with sample count. 16-shot->full is 38x data for only +15.58pp, plateauing at 82.95%. CoOp full-data per-class: 24/43 classes <80%; LoRA: 0/43. Worst CoOp classes are direction-symmetric symbolic signs (frozen-feature bottleneck): keep_left 20.0% vs LoRA 96.7%; go_straight_or_left 26.7% vs 100%; dangerous_curve_left 30.0% vs 100%; dangerous_curve_right 47.8% vs 100%.
